name: ExtensionComposition_Attester_Mode
title: R5: mode additional types
description: R5: `Composition.attester.mode` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Composition.attester.mode` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Composition.attester.mode` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Composition.attester.mode` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `Composition.attester.mode` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `Composition.attester.mode` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Composition.attester.mode` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Composition.attester.mode` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Composition.attester.mode` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `Composition.attester.mode` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding.
